title: RIO Governance Decision — Intent Envelope + Verification + Governance + Approval
description: Extracted from controlPlane.ts sections A1 (IntentEnvelope), A2 (VerificationResult), A3 (GovernanceDecision), A4 (ApprovalRecord), and A8 (LearningAnalysis).

IntentEnvelope.description: controlPlane.ts — A1: CANONICAL INTENT ENVELOPE. The atomic unit of proposed action. Every action in the system starts here.

actor_id.description: The human or system that initiated the action.

timestamp.description: Unix epoch milliseconds. Must be within INTENT_TTL_MS (300000ms = 5 minutes) of current time.

nonce.description: UUID. Must be unique. Replay protection.

target.description: Target of the action (same as action_type in current implementation).

parameters.description: Tool arguments. Must be a non-null object.

policy_version_target.description: Policy version this intent was created against (e.g., 'POLICY-v0.3').

VerificationResult.description: controlPlane.ts — A2: VERIFICATION LAYER. Runs BEFORE governance. Six checks in order: schema, auth, signature, TTL, nonce, replay.

schema_valid.description: All required fields present and non-empty. source_type in enum. parameters is non-null object.

replay_check.description: Nonce not already in usedNonces set.

verified.description: ALL six checks must pass. verified = schema_valid AND auth_valid AND signature_valid AND ttl_valid AND nonce_valid AND replay_check.

GovernanceDecision.description: controlPlane.ts — A3: GOVERNANCE DECISION OBJECT. Produced ONLY after verification passes.

decision.description: LOW → APPROVE. MEDIUM → REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL (1 approval). HIGH → REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL (1 approval).

ApprovalRecord.description: controlPlane.ts — A4: HUMAN AUTHORIZATION BOUNDARY. Silence equals refusal — no implied approval.

approval_artifact.description: The signature or token proving authorization.

ExpressionOutput.description: controlPlane.ts — §2.E EXPRESSION ISOLATION. Non-authoritative AI output. CANNOT be passed to rio_process_intent() or rio_approve_intent(). Conversion to IntentEnvelope requires explicit human approval via expression_to_intent().

__expression_output.description: Discriminator. Prevents structural compatibility with IntentEnvelope.

LearningAnalysis.description: controlPlane.ts — A8: LEARNING LOOP ANALYSIS. Advisory only. mutates_live_policy is ALWAYS false.

false_positives.description: LOW risk that should have been flagged.

false_negatives.description: HIGH risk that was auto-approved. Should be 0 by design.

policy_misses.description: Actions that passed policy but failed.

mutates_live_policy.description: ALWAYS false. Learning is advisory only.

PolicyRecommendation.description: controlPlane.ts — Learning loop recommendation. Status is ALWAYS PENDING_REVIEW. Never auto-applied.

ReplayInput.description: controlPlane.ts — Suggested replay for failed executions.

verification_before_governance.description: controlPlane.ts evaluateGovernance(). Throws GOVERNANCE_ERROR if verification.verified is false. Governance ONLY runs after verification passes.

silence_equals_refusal.description: controlPlane.ts. If governance.decision === 'REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL' and no approval is provided, the system returns 'Human approval required but not provided. Silence equals refusal.'

approval_binding.description: controlPlane.ts validateApproval(). approval.intent_hash must match governance.intent_hash. approval.decision_id must match governance.decision_id. approval_status must be 'APPROVED'. approval_artifact must be >= 10 chars.

expression_isolation.description: controlPlane.ts §2.E. ExpressionOutput CANNOT be passed to rio_process_intent() or rio_approve_intent(). isExpressionOutput() type guard checks __expression_output === true. kernelExecutor.ts rejects at entry. expression_to_intent() requires approvedByHuman === true.

intent_ttl.description: controlPlane.ts. INTENT_TTL_MS = 300000 (5 minutes). Intents older than this fail TTL check.

nonce_ttl.description: controlPlane.ts. NONCE_TTL_MS = 600000 (10 minutes). Nonces expire after 10 minutes.

risk_decision_matrix.description: controlPlane.ts evaluateGovernance(). LOW → APPROVE (0 approvals). MEDIUM → REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL (1 approval). HIGH → REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL (1 approval).

learning_never_mutates.description: controlPlane.ts. LearningAnalysis.mutates_live_policy is ALWAYS false. Recommendations have status PENDING_REVIEW. Learning is advisory until explicitly promoted by a human.

failure_conditions.verification_failure: Any of the 6 checks fails → verified=false → governance cannot run → intent rejected.
failure_conditions.governance_deny: If governance.decision === 'DENY' → intent rejected. No execution.
failure_conditions.missing_approval: If REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL and no approval → 'Silence equals refusal.' Intent rejected.
failure_conditions.expression_isolation_violation: If ExpressionOutput enters rio_process_intent() → EXPRESSION_ISOLATION_VIOLATION error. If expression_to_intent() called with approvedByHuman=false → EXPRESSION_ISOLATION_VIOLATION error.
failure_conditions.replay_detected: If nonce already in usedNonces → replay_check=false → verification fails.

authority_boundary_rule.rule: Execution requires a locally issued authorization. Upstream receipts may be consumed but never grant permission.
authority_boundary_rule.applies_to: The verification result is a receipt of intent validation. It does not authorize execution. A separate governance decision must be issued. The governance decision does not authorize execution either — a separate execution token must be issued.
